inputs.label: Milliliters per Teaspoon
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor; 5 for metric, 4.92892 for US customary, 5.91939 for UK imperial

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result

inputs.label: Number of Conversions
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for batch scaling (e.g., number of identical portions)

formulas.primary: Math.round(teaspoons * mlPerTeaspoon * numberOfConversions * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
formulas.Convert_teaspoons_to_base_milliliters__t: Convert teaspoons to base milliliters (teaspoons × milliliters per teaspoon).
formulas.Scale_by_the_number_of_conversions__batc: Scale by the number of conversions (batch factor).
formulas.Round_the_result_to_the_specified_decima: Round the result to the specified decimal places.

breakdown: Step 1: Convert teaspoons to base milliliters (teaspoons × milliliters per teaspoon).
Step 2: Scale by the number of conversions (batch factor).
Step 3: Round the result to the specified decimal places.
